apihelp-flowthank-summary: Dir ogeysiis mahadcelin dadweyne oo loogu talagalay faallo Flow ah.
apihelp-flowthank-param-postid: Aqoonsiga UUID ee boostada la doonayo in lagu mahadceliyo.
apihelp-thank-param-rev: Aqoonsiga dib u eegista lagu mahadcelinayo. Tan ama 'log' waa in la bixiyo.
apihelp-thank-param-log: Aqoonsiga diiwaanka lagu mahadcelinayo. Tan ama 'rev' waa in la bixiyo.
apihelp-thank-param-source: Xadhig gaaban oo sharxaya halka codsigu ka yimid, tusaale ahaan <kbd>diff</kbd> ama <kbd>taariikh</kbd>.
apihelp-thank-example-1: Dir mahadcelin dib u eegista <kbd>ID 456</kbd>, iyadoo isha ay tahay bogga diff.
